Motion To Change Venue And Transfer Action
Off Calendar Mar-28-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT STAFF HOLDINGS, INC.'S Motion To Change Venue And Transfer Action.

Defendant Staff Holdings, Inc.'s motion to change venue and transfer action to Fresno County is granted. Plaintiffs Allen Jackson and Serena Jackson do not oppose the motion.

Counsel for defendant is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
